title: hieracium lamprocomum
intro: Hieracium lamprocomum, also known as yellow hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Hieracium lamprocomum include its use as an anti-inflammatory and astringent, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Hieracium lamprocomum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
